result:
## Summary

**Root cause:** The `preferences_backup_limits.xml` preference screen was never added to the search index in `HeaderFragment.configureSearchBar()`. All other preference screens (General, Reviewing, Sync, Notifications, Appearance, Controls, Accessibility, Advanced, Dev Options) were explicitly indexed, but Backups was missing.

**Fix:** Added `index(R.xml.preferences_backup_limits)` at `HeaderFragment.kt:128` inside the `configureSearchBar()` method, alongside all the other indexed preference screens.

This single-line change ensures that when users search for "back" (or "backup", "backups", or any of the sub-preference titles like "daily backups to keep") in the Settings search bar, the Backups preferences will appear in the search results — matching the behavior already working for Sync and other settings categories.
